name: Diabetic Salmon Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and reserve 3 tbsp. of liquid.
2. Flake the salmon.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the flaked salmon, reserved liquid, crumbs, celery, onion, egg, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Form the mixture into 5 patties.
5. In a lightly greased skillet over medium heat, sauté the patties about 3 minutes on each side.
6. Serve on hamburger buns with your choice of toppings.
